name: GPT-5 nano
metaDescription: GPT-5 nano (OpenAI), released 2025-08-07 — part of the GPT Nano line. First GPT-5-generation nano model.
overview: GPT-5 nano is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Nano line. Released 2025-08-07. OpenAI's smallest, cheapest API-only line for tasks where speed and cost matter most.
What's notable in this version: First GPT-5-generation nano model.
